notes: Heuristic Valve/Steam region candidates for the Valve Region Latency Diagnostic. These are Steam connection-manager endpoints from Valve's directory service, used as a route-quality proxy rather than Valve-official in-match CS2 ping.

targets.Label: Stockholm
targets.Provenance: Steam directory CM endpoint set, updated from ISteamDirectory/GetCMList.
targets.Notes: Route-quality proxy only. TCP handshake timing is not equivalent to CS2 UDP/SDR in-match ping.
